creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=250d5ead159c6eb7aeebe222fd7f93a71b724cd3

commit 250d5ead159c6eb7aeebe222fd7f93a71b724cd3
Author:     Ben Shertenlieb <b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com>
AuthorDate: 2023-03-10 09:22:29 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-03-10 11:12:21 +0000

    multimedia/plexmediaserver-plexpass: Update to 1.31.2.6783

    ChangeLog: https://forums.plex.tv/t/plex-media-server/30447/561

    NEW:
     * Add series- and season-level preferences controlling audio and subtitle
       stream selection

    FIXES:
     * Request to system/agents could fail.
     * Library creation could fail during set up
     * Smart playlists could fail when set to show/season/artist/album types when
       requested by someone other than server admin
     * The server could exit unexpectedly if a database error occurred within
       certain notification-handling code
     * TV episodes with certain naming formats involving underscores could fail to
       be scanned in

    PR:             270067
    Reported by:    b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com (maintainer)

 multimedia/plexmediaserver-plexpass/Makefile | 4 ++--
 multimedia/plexmediaserver-plexpass/distinfo | 6 +++---
 2 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)
